caption: A man with a beard and short-cropped hair is seated in a recording studio, positioned in front of a dark, ribbed acoustic foam wall. He wears over-ear black headphones and a white t-shirt featuring the text "Stay Lucid" on the chest. A professional silver microphone, mounted on a shock mount and boom arm, is positioned closely in front of his face. Throughout the sequence, the man is speaking, with his facial expressions and mouth movements shifting as he talks. In the initial stages, he looks slightly to the side with his mouth open, then closes his eyes momentarily while continuing to speak. He eventually returns to looking forward, his expression remaining focused as he continues his delivery into the microphone. He remains stationary in his seat throughout the clip, with the only visible movement being his facial expressions and speech.
